Repeatable to: 6 credits.

DANC249 Modern Dance II (3 Credits)

Continuation of DANC248.

Prerequisite: DANC248; and permission of ARHU-School of Theatre, Dance & Performance Studies department.

Repeatable to: 6 credits.

DANC258 Jazz I (2 Credits)

Jazz warm-ups and combinations emphasizing rhythm and movement isolations.
